titles.title: I Just Came to Praise the Lord

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I just came to thank the Lord I just came to thank the Lord I just came to thank his holy name I just came to thank the Lord

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He came into my life one very special day He came into my heart, and showed me a better way He said He'd never depart; and this is what I say I just came to thank the Lord

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I just came to love the Lord I just came to love the Lord I just came to love his holy name I just came to love the Lord

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I just came to praise the Lord I just came to praise the Lord I just came to praise his holy name I just came to praise the Lord
